showcaseCategories.name: PET Preform Mold

moldHighlights.title: LIHE PRECISION
moldHighlights.description: As a Coca-Cola verified supplier in the Asia region, we carry a legacy of engineering excellence, combining decades of foundational expertise with modern, data-driven manufacturing processes. Our mission is to be the strongest technical backbone for our partners, transforming complex technical requirements into high-efficiency production realities.

items.title: Universal Compatibility & System Retrofitting
items.content: LIHE Precision empowers manufacturers to optimize their existing assets with high-quality, third-party compatible components.
bullets: Interchangeable Parts: 100% interchangeable conversion parts for Husky, SACMI, SIPA, NETSTAL, MHT, OTTO, ASB, Krupps, and Corvaglia systems.
Advanced Hot Runner Systems: Husky Ultra design with an industry-leading 3-year leakage-proof guarantee.
Project Retrofitting: Complete mold overhauls and performance upgrades to restore aging assets to OEM-level efficiency.

items.title: Uncompromising Quality Control
items.content: We quantify our quality to ensure absolute reliability on your production floor.
bullets: Precision Benchmarking: Tooling consistently achieves a CPK ≥ 1.33.
Reliability: Operational defect rates maintained as low as 0.0064%.
Durability: Built to withstand up to 8 million shots on Husky/SACMI/Netstal platforms.
Metrology: In-house laboratory equipped with Zeiss CMM (Coordinate Measuring Machines) for impartial validation reports.

items.title: Sustainability & Lightweighting (ESG Solutions)
items.content: In response to global environmental trends, LIHE provides R&D-driven solutions to reduce plastic consumption and operational costs.
bullets: Material Savings: Lightweighting proposals help clients reduce preform weight by 1g to 2g through neck or wall-thickness optimization.
Superior ROI: Retrofitting existing molds for lightweighting costs only 25%–40% of a new mold price, with a short payback period.
Thermal Management: Optimized cooling structures can reduce neck cooling time by up to 0.5 seconds, accelerating throughput.

items.title: Agile Supply Chain & Global Support
items.content: We offer some of the most aggressive lead times in the industry to keep your production lines moving.
bullets: After-Sales: Dedicated technical team provides on-site machine interface audits, mold installation, machine start-up support, and regular preventive maintenance.
